turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, quick question about my Bosch dishwasher.
Sure — what would you like to know about your Bosch dishwasher?
It runs really long and it's so quiet I can barely tell it's on — is something wrong with it?

Good news — that's normal for a Bosch. Per our Bosch brand guide, Bosch dishwashers heat their water internally and run longer, cooler cycles than typical US-style machines, so a long cycle time isn't a defect. They're also notably quiet — quiet enough that people sometimes think a running machine is dead. Many models have a status indicator, often projected onto the floor or shown on the door edge, if you want to confirm it's mid-cycle. (Source: docs/library/brands/bosch.md)
That's a relief, thanks for checking.

Anytime! One tip for your Bosch: clean the filter assembly at the bottom of the tub monthly — a clogged filter is the most common cause of poor wash results. Let me know if anything actually misbehaves.
